robot_capabilities.inspection_drone: Inspection Drone autonomous robot for operational support and emergency response.
robot_capabilities.valve_control_robot: Valve Control Robot autonomous robot for operational support and emergency response.
robot_capabilities.maintenance_rover: Maintenance Rover autonomous robot for operational support and emergency response.
robot_capabilities.safety_monitor_bot: Safety Monitor Bot autonomous robot for operational support and emergency response.
robot_capabilities.cleaning_robot: Cleaning Robot autonomous robot for operational support and emergency response.

robot_morphology.inspection_drone: Type: Aerial Drone, Radius: 0.25 m, Payload: 3 kg, Mobility: Omnidirectional
robot_morphology.valve_control_robot: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.30 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic
robot_morphology.maintenance_rover: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.30 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic
robot_morphology.safety_monitor_bot: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.30 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic
robot_morphology.cleaning_robot: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.30 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic

task_specific_rules: Emergency events override ongoing low-priority tasks.
Robots should coordinate dynamically for multi-agent task execution.
Safety-critical alerts must interrupt current workflows.
task_replanning_rules: Robots must replan routes when paths become blocked.
Nearest available robot should respond to emergency events.
Idle robots can assist overloaded robots during critical operations.
